lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you impart your wise knowledge to me, O Oracle?

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Capes are always in fashion!

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: The light at the end of the tunnel is the demon-infested lava pit.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Beware the cabbage: it is both green AND leafy.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: They say that ham does not mix well with other kinds of meat.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: A woodchuck does not chuck wood.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: No. I'm not in the mood.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: It's not you; it's me.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Too many cooks spoil the anchovy pizza.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: The God Wars are over...as long as the thing they were fighting over remains hidden.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: He who uses the power of custard mixes it with his tears.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Nothing like a tasty fish.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Don't judge a book by its cover - judge it on its' grammar and, punctuation.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Yes, I can. But I'm not going to.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: A bird in the hand can make a tasty snack.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Pies...they're great, aren't they?

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Who guards the guardsmen?

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: The great snake of Guthix guards more than she knows.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Do not fear the dragons...fear their kin.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Everyone you know will one day be dead.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: If a tree falls in the forest and no one is around, then nobody gets Woodcutting xp.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Sometimes you get lucky, sometimes you don't.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: The chicken came before the egg.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Is it time to wake up? I am not sure...

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: When in Asgarnia, do as the Asgarnians do.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: An answer is unimportant; it is the question that matters.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: The goblins will never make up their minds on their own.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Jas left a stone behind.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Many secrets are buried under this land.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: There are no crisps at the party.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Help wanted? Enquire within.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: I've got a little challenge for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK...

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Can you answer this for me please.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: That's wrong I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: That's right, well done!

sections.title: Delivering the Old man's message to the Oracle

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got a message for you from the Wise Old Man who lives in Draynor Village.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: Many do my wisdom seek; few do their own wisdom to me send!

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: It doesn't look like you have space for your reward. Come back later when you do.

lines.speaker: Oracle
lines.text: New life from these shall perchance spring!
